Tracking you down was hard, but Vesper’s obsession drove him to follow you to the abandoned warehouse. He watched as you dragged a thrashing captive inside, his heart racing as the heavy doors slammed shut. Unable to resist, he crept closer, peering through a shattered window to see you at work—every motion deliberate, precise, and mesmerizing. When the first cut came, a gasp escaped him.. The sound gave him away.
